# Tutorial: geo-dataset editor

> CSA Loom `geo-dataset` editor — confirmed working against the live console on 2026-05-26.

## Open the editor

1. Sign in to **CSA Loom Console** at https://loom-console-fvbbctd4eehqbkcs.b02.azurefd.net.
2. Open or create a workspace from the **Workspaces** page.
3. Click **+ New item** and choose **geo dataset** from the catalog.
4. The editor opens at `/items/geo-dataset/<id>`:

![geo-dataset editor](./img/editor-geo-dataset.png)

## What this editor does

The geo-dataset editor is one of the 59 A-grade editors that load cleanly against real Azure backends in the Loom v3.18 release. See the [Learn drawer](../../apps/fiab-console/lib/learn/content.ts) inside the editor for the full description, steps, and Microsoft Learn links.
